confirmed.note: track-resolution preamble copied between setTrackMixer and setMixerParamRT handlers: 'auto audioTracks=te::getAudioTracks(*edit); te::AudioTrack* track=nullptr; if(trackId==(int)audioTracks.size()) track=dynamic_cast<te::AudioTrack*>(edit->getMasterTrack()); else if(...) track=audioTracks[trackId];' verbatim, bodies then diverge (volume/pan/mute/solo vs RT param switch)

5-line track-resolution guard 'auto audioTracks=te::getAudioTracks(*edit); if(trackId<0||trackId>=(int)audioTracks.size()){complete("{\"success\":false}");return;} auto* track=audioTracks[trackId];' copy-pasted across ~9 withNativeFunction handlers added in this single commit, each body diverging afterward

false_positives.what_happened: 'refactored loader' splits a 1082-line monolith BirdLoader.cpp into BirdParser/BirdPopulator/BirdSerializer. A line/token detector comparing the new files against the same-commit deletion (or against the prior BirdLoader.cpp blob) flags large verbatim overlap, but this is a MOVE (extract), not duplication — the original copies are gone, no surviving redundancy.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: when an ADDED block's near-identical BASE block lives in a file that is DELETED (or heavily shrunk, net lines<<0) in the SAME commit, classify as 'extracted/moved' and suppress. Heuristic: pair each ADDED region with same-commit deletions before cross-file dup scoring; if base-of-match is a deletion, drop the hit.

false_positives.what_happened: Every JUCE WebBrowser handler is '.withNativeFunction("name", [this](auto& args, auto complete){ if(!edit||args.size()<N){complete(err);return;} ... complete(juce::JSON::toString(...)); })'. The fixed scaffold (arg-check, callAsync wrapper, complete(json)) makes ANY two unrelated handlers score high on token similarity even when their actual logic differs, inflating cross/within-file hit counts.
false_positives.fix_proposal: #056: lower weight of project-wide ubiquitous idiom tokens. Build a per-repo frequency model of n-grams; if a matched block is dominated by tokens whose document-frequency exceeds a threshold (e.g. .withNativeFunction / complete / juce::JSON::toString appearing in >X% of handlers), discount the match. Only flag when the DIVERGENT (non-scaffold) core also exceeds min unique-token length.

cycle.desc: no include cycle: SCC<=1 across all C++ in HEAD
cycle.evidence: archcheck --graph on libraries/juce-host => sccs_cyclic=0, largest_scc=1. The entire app/ C++ tree (SongbirdEditor + bridge/ + loader/, where all churn lived) was removed from HEAD; project pivoted to Rust + thin JUCE host (3 .cpp). Remaining C++ has 0 internal edges. No author-code cycle exists in current tree.
